summary: Iteration 61 - Supabase Data CRUD Testing: All 31 backend tests passed (100%). Verified companies and avatars are stored in Supabase tenants.settings JSONB column. AgentZZ company exists and persists across sessions.

success_rate.backend: 100% (31/31 tests passed - 13 from iteration60 + 18 from iteration61)

seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed companies created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data persistence now uses Supabase (not MongoDB). Companies and avatars stored in tenants.settings JSONB column as studio_companies and studio_avatars arrays. Previous iteration_60 report incorrectly mentioned MongoDB - architecture has changed to Supabase.

backend.POST /api/data/companies (create): Creates company with auto-generated 12-char hex ID, adds timestamps - PASSED
backend.POST /api/data/companies (update): Updates by id, preserves created_at timestamp - PASSED
backend.POST /api/data/companies/primary/{id}: Sets company as primary, unsets others - PASSED
backend.DELETE /api/data/companies/{id}: Removes company from JSONB array - PASSED
backend.POST /api/data/avatars (create): Creates avatar with all fields (url, voice, angles, video_url) - PASSED
backend.POST /api/data/avatars (update): Updates existing avatar by id - PASSED
backend.DELETE /api/data/avatars/{id}: Deletes specific avatar from array - PASSED
backend.DELETE /api/data/avatars: Deletes all avatars, returns count - PASSED
backend.Authentication required: All endpoints return 401/422 without valid auth - PASSED
backend.AgentZZ company exists: Pre-seeded company found in database - PASSED
backend.Data persistence across sessions: Data persists in Supabase, readable in new sessions - PASSED

data_architecture.tenant_resolution: get_current_tenant dependency resolves tenant from authenticated user
